industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Taronis Fuels, Inc.
summary: Taronis Fuels, Inc. operates as a renewable fuel and power generation company in the United States. It manufactures, sells, and distributes MagneGas, which is a metal cutting fuel. The company sells and distributes a line of industrial gases and welding equipment and services to a range of end market users, including metalworking, manufacturing, utility power plants, medical, agriculture, transportation, repair, demolition, salvage, and other industries. Taronis Fuels, Inc. operates 28 industrial gas retail locations. The company was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in Peoria, Arizona.
